elements.content:
flowchart LR
  U[User Request] --> API[API Layer]
  API --> VAL[Input Validation]
  VAL --> GW[Gateway]
  GW --> AUTH[Authentication]
  AUTH --> ROUTE[Routing Rules]
  ROUTE --> PB[Prompt Builder]
  SYS[System Instructions] --> PB
  Q[User Question] --> PB
  HIST[Chat History] --> PB
  PB --> SAFE{Safety Filters}
  SAFE -->|approved| MR[Claude Engine]
  SAFE -->|blocked| BLK[Blocked]
  MR --> TOK[Tokenization]
  TOK --> CTX[Context Window]
  CTX --> GPU[GPU Compute]
  GPU --> RAW[Raw Output]
  RAW --> PP[Post Processor]
  PP --> POL[Policy Check]
  POL --> FMT[Formatted Reply]
  FMT --> DEL[API Delivery]
  DEL --> U
  DEL --> LOG[Logs]
  DEL --> MET[Metrics]
  DEL --> ERR[Error Handling]
  classDef active fill:#ff5c00,stroke:#ffffff,stroke-width:3px,color:#000000;
  classDef support fill:#181818,stroke:#444444,color:#bbbbbb;
  class API,VAL active;

API Intake

A Claude request starts as plain user input, then gets normalized before the deeper system touches it.

- Receive the user request
- Check required fields
- Reject malformed input
API Intake

Gateway + Auth

The gateway acts like the front door: prove who you are, then route the request correctly.

- Verify identity
- Attach user context
- Choose the next route

flowchart LR
  U[User Request] --> API[API Layer]
  API --> VAL[Input Validation]
  VAL --> GW[Gateway]
  GW --> AUTH[Authentication]
  AUTH --> ROUTE[Routing Rules]
  ROUTE --> PB[Prompt Builder]
  SYS[System Instructions] --> PB
  Q[User Question] --> PB
  HIST[Chat History] --> PB
  PB --> SAFE{Safety Filters}
  SAFE -->|approved| MR[Claude Engine]
  SAFE -->|blocked| BLK[Blocked]
  MR --> TOK[Tokenization]
  TOK --> CTX[Context Window]
  CTX --> GPU[GPU Compute]
  GPU --> RAW[Raw Output]
  RAW --> PP[Post Processor]
  PP --> POL[Policy Check]
  POL --> FMT[Formatted Reply]
  FMT --> DEL[API Delivery]
  DEL --> U
  DEL --> LOG[Logs]
  DEL --> MET[Metrics]
  DEL --> ERR[Error Handling]
  classDef active fill:#ff5c00,stroke:#ffffff,stroke-width:3px,color:#000000;
  classDef support fill:#181818,stroke:#444444,color:#bbbbbb;
  class GW,AUTH,ROUTE active;
Gateway + Auth

flowchart LR
  U[User Request] --> API[API Layer]
  API --> VAL[Input Validation]
  VAL --> GW[Gateway]
  GW --> AUTH[Authentication]
  AUTH --> ROUTE[Routing Rules]
  ROUTE --> PB[Prompt Builder]
  SYS[System Instructions] --> PB
  Q[User Question] --> PB
  HIST[Chat History] --> PB
  PB --> SAFE{Safety Filters}
  SAFE -->|approved| MR[Claude Engine]
  SAFE -->|blocked| BLK[Blocked]
  MR --> TOK[Tokenization]
  TOK --> CTX[Context Window]
  CTX --> GPU[GPU Compute]
  GPU --> RAW[Raw Output]
  RAW --> PP[Post Processor]
  PP --> POL[Policy Check]
  POL --> FMT[Formatted Reply]
  FMT --> DEL[API Delivery]
  DEL --> U
  DEL --> LOG[Logs]
  DEL --> MET[Metrics]
  DEL --> ERR[Error Handling]
  classDef active fill:#ff5c00,stroke:#ffffff,stroke-width:3px,color:#000000;
  classDef caution fill:#ffd166,stroke:#ffffff,stroke-width:3px,color:#000000;
  class SYS,Q,HIST,PB active;
  class SAFE caution;

Prompt Assembly

Claude does not receive only your latest sentence. The system builds a full prompt package first.

- System instructions
- Current user question
- Relevant chat history
- Safety screening
Prompt Assembly

Model Inference

If the prompt passes safety, Claude turns text into tokens, works inside a context window, and runs compute to produce raw output.

- Tokenize the prompt
- Use the context window
- Run GPU compute
- Produce raw text

flowchart LR
  U[User Request] --> API[API Layer]
  API --> VAL[Input Validation]
  VAL --> GW[Gateway]
  GW --> AUTH[Authentication]
  AUTH --> ROUTE[Routing Rules]
  ROUTE --> PB[Prompt Builder]
  SYS[System Instructions] --> PB
  Q[User Question] --> PB
  HIST[Chat History] --> PB
  PB --> SAFE{Safety Filters}
  SAFE -->|approved| MR[Claude Engine]
  SAFE -->|blocked| BLK[Blocked]
  MR --> TOK[Tokenization]
  TOK --> CTX[Context Window]
  CTX --> GPU[GPU Compute]
  GPU --> RAW[Raw Output]
  RAW --> PP[Post Processor]
  PP --> POL[Policy Check]
  POL --> FMT[Formatted Reply]
  FMT --> DEL[API Delivery]
  DEL --> U
  DEL --> LOG[Logs]
  DEL --> MET[Metrics]
  DEL --> ERR[Error Handling]
  classDef active fill:#ff5c00,stroke:#ffffff,stroke-width:3px,color:#000000;
  classDef engine fill:#8b5cf6,stroke:#ffffff,stroke-width:3px,color:#ffffff;
  class MR engine;
  class TOK,CTX,GPU,RAW active;
Model Inference

flowchart LR
  U[User Request] --> API[API Layer]
  API --> VAL[Input Validation]
  VAL --> GW[Gateway]
  GW --> AUTH[Authentication]
  AUTH --> ROUTE[Routing Rules]
  ROUTE --> PB[Prompt Builder]
  SYS[System Instructions] --> PB
  Q[User Question] --> PB
  HIST[Chat History] --> PB
  PB --> SAFE{Safety Filters}
  SAFE -->|approved| MR[Claude Engine]
  SAFE -->|blocked| BLK[Blocked]
  MR --> TOK[Tokenization]
  TOK --> CTX[Context Window]
  CTX --> GPU[GPU Compute]
  GPU --> RAW[Raw Output]
  RAW --> PP[Post Processor]
  PP --> POL[Policy Check]
  POL --> FMT[Formatted Reply]
  FMT --> DEL[API Delivery]
  DEL --> U
  DEL --> LOG[Logs]
  DEL --> MET[Metrics]
  DEL --> ERR[Error Handling]
  classDef active fill:#ff5c00,stroke:#ffffff,stroke-width:3px,color:#000000;
  classDef check fill:#22c55e,stroke:#ffffff,stroke-width:3px,color:#000000;
  class RAW,PP,FMT active;
  class POL check;

Post-Processing

The raw answer gets shaped into something useful: readable, structured, and policy-compliant.

- Clean up the response
- Apply formatting
- Check policy compliance
Post-Processing

Delivery + Ops

The final answer returns through the API while the platform records what happened and watches for issues.

- Send the answer back
- Write logs
- Track metrics
- Handle errors

flowchart LR
  U[User Request] --> API[API Layer]
  API --> VAL[Input Validation]
  VAL --> GW[Gateway]
  GW --> AUTH[Authentication]
  AUTH --> ROUTE[Routing Rules]
  ROUTE --> PB[Prompt Builder]
  SYS[System Instructions] --> PB
  Q[User Question] --> PB
  HIST[Chat History] --> PB
  PB --> SAFE{Safety Filters}
  SAFE -->|approved| MR[Claude Engine]
  SAFE -->|blocked| BLK[Blocked]
  MR --> TOK[Tokenization]
  TOK --> CTX[Context Window]
  CTX --> GPU[GPU Compute]
  GPU --> RAW[Raw Output]
  RAW --> PP[Post Processor]
  PP --> POL[Policy Check]
  POL --> FMT[Formatted Reply]
  FMT --> DEL[API Delivery]
  DEL --> U
  DEL --> LOG[Logs]
  DEL --> MET[Metrics]
  DEL --> ERR[Error Handling]
  classDef active fill:#ff5c00,stroke:#ffffff,stroke-width:3px,color:#000000;
  classDef ops fill:#0ea5e9,stroke:#ffffff,stroke-width:3px,color:#000000;
  class FMT,DEL,U active;
  class LOG,MET,ERR ops;
Delivery + Ops

Claude Code Path: 7 Steps

The beginner mental model is simple: input comes in, the system prepares it, Claude runs, and the answer comes back.

- User input enters the API
- Validation and auth protect the system
- Prompt construction adds context
- Safety filters screen the request
- Claude generates raw output
Claude Code Path: 7 Steps
